---
title: "The Rev. and Hon. Alan Brodrick"
---

## The Rev. and Hon. Alan Brodrick

**Dates:** (1840-1909)

### Description

Vicar of Bramshaw, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1874),

### Biography

He was also Rector of Alverstoke, poet, church historian and son of the 7th Viscount Midleton.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
